game.maze_escape.controls: [↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→] Move [P] Change Size/Mode [S] Save [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.maze_escape.description: Find the correct path through the intricate maze, successfully navigating from start to finish.
game.maze_escape.details:
f%Find the shortest path and escape the maze.

{tc:yellow}Difficulty:{tc:clear}
{tc:#ff7f27}Mode 1:{tc:clear} No keys, no time limit.
{tc:#ff7f27}Mode 2:{tc:clear} Has keys, no time limit.
{tc:#ff7f27}Mode 3:{tc:clear} No keys, timed.
{tc:#ff7f27}Mode 4:{tc:clear} Has keys, timed.

{tc:yellow}Press P to change difficulty:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Difficulty only:{tc:clear} 1-4
{tc:light_cyan}Size and mode:{tc:clear} rows cols 1-4

{tc:yellow}Size:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Rows:{tc:clear} 8 - 22
{tc:light_cyan}Cols:{tc:clear} 10 - 32

{tc:yellow}Items:{tc:clear}
{tc:yellow}@{tc:clear} Player character.
{tc:rgb(120,255,120)}*{tc:clear} Key, can open doors.
{tc:rgb(255,190,80)}%{tc:clear} Door, requires a key to open.
{tc:light_cyan}&{tc:clear} Exit, the player's goal.

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[?]/[?]/[?]/[?]{tc:clear} Move
{tc:light_cyan}[P]{tc:clear} Change size/mode
{tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.maze_escape.input_config_hint: Enter difficulty number or rows cols mode.
game.maze_escape.input_config_invalid: Invalid configuration. Allowed range: rows 8-22, cols 10-32, mode 1-4.
game.maze_escape.lose_banner: You got trapped in the maze!
game.maze_escape.name: Maze Escape
warning.back_to_game_list_hint: Press ESC / Q to return to the game list
warning.enlarge_hint: Please enlarge the terminal window to continue.
